title: A Little Bump Update
excerpt: This should have been posted last week, but I thought it would be fine to post a bit late anyway. Updates are pretty much the same. Although at week 23 I am experiencing heartburn for the first time in my…
body:
This should have been posted last week, but I thought it would be fine to post a bit late anyway. Updates are pretty much the same. Although at week 23 I am experiencing heartburn for the first time in my life. That isn't too fun. But everything else is going great. He's been quite the trooper on this trip (we're leaving Lisbon today to head back to Barcelona for a couple days).  Then I look forward to being home for a couple weeks. The month of May was a blur, with zero weekends spent at home.

photo by Ann-Marie Morris | Dress purchased in China in 2008 | Geotag | Hello font
